evidence_summary: Drift on Claude list summaries + cache v2 with persisted drift; Codex list threads include drift; fixture cache migrated; list/detail tests extended. claude-cache and claude-api tests aligned to 6 sessions in projects fixtures.
risks: Claude cache schema v2 invalidates prior v1 on-disk caches (one-time rebuild). Thread summaries now include a drift field—consumers must tolerate the extra key. claude-cache.test.js and claude-api.test.js were outside the original AGHUD-035 Agent-B whitelist but were updated so provider tests stay green.
